utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Coming through ! Oh ! Coming through ! Oh ! Hello ! Hi ! No ! Right ! Coming through !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh well , it is not so bad .

utterances.speaker: Fireman #1
utterances.text: Yeah , most of the damage is pretty mostly contained in the bedrooms .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey buddy , do you think I can borrow your uniform this Thursday ?

utterances.text: Joey ! He is working ! You would look good in that .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , it is bad . It is really bad . The only thing in there that is not burned is an ax . Which I do not remember buying !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Everything ruined . My bed . My clothes . Look at my favorite blue sweater .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Fine ! I am sorry for your loss !

utterances.speaker: Fireman #1
utterances.text: So uh , you are not gonna be able to live here for a while , you ladies have a place to stay ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow ! Oh ... okay , look pal , I am not in the mood to be hit on right now !

utterances.text: Have you figured out what started the fire Mr . Fireman ?
